TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Singsiya, title = Singsiya, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Singsiya} }

S.FORM: alang Singsiya ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Karing Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 725 buwan, 2,092 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 16% kyan ku 345 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 84% kyan ku 1,747 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 13%, Tayan 1%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Singsiya hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Singsiya hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Singsiya hya' ga bsilung. tay mkraya' na Singsiya hya' ga bsilung. tay mkyahu' na Singsiya hya' ga Lasutan. tay 'zil na Singsiya hya' ga Sakur. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Singsiya ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Karing Si, kwara sali buwan nya ga 725 buwan, 2,092 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 16% kyan ku 345 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 84% kyan ku 1,747 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 13%, Tayan 1%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Singsiya hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Singsiya hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Singsiya hya' ga bsilung. tay mkraya' na Singsiya hya' ga bsilung. tay mkyahu' na Singsiya hya' ga Lasutan. tay 'zil na Singsiya hya' ga Sakur. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč s~…ēiŇčs~…ēija …£a nija mki s~…ēku kariŇč keŇč atu kariŇč s~…ēi, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *,*** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *,*** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, tajan *%, truku *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran, Ňčas~…ēal ps~…ēatu te…£ami ru pqniqan iju. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na s~…ēiŇčs~…ēija ńßja Ē …£a ő≤s~…ēiluŇč. taj Ēzil na s~…ēiŇčs~…ēija ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax. taj mkjańßu Ē na s~…ēiŇčs~…ēija ńßja Ē …£a ő≤s~…ēiluŇč. taj mkraja Ē na s~…ēiŇčs~…ēija ńßja Ē …£a ő≤s~…ēiluŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na s~…ēiŇčs~…ēija ńßja Ē …£a las~…ēutan. taj Ēzil na s~…ēiŇčs~…ēija ńßja Ē …£a s~…ēakur. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
